title: Bus ride to Cusco — Lima-to-Cusco trip prep
html:
TL;DR

  • Late-August 2021 trip-prep mini-list during Yahir's Peru trip: "plane ride to Cusco, reserve shit here in Lima or over in Cusco regarding activities, buy a journal, climb to the cross, get sick picture on top of a mural."
  • "buy a journal" in the middle of a logistics list — this is the actual purchase that probably launched a chunk of the manual-journal output that surfaces later. Material origin of the journaling habit.
  • "climb to the cross" references Cristo Blanco above Cusco — the canonical sunrise-hike Yahir was planning to execute.
  • The mid-trip handoff of Lima-vs-Cusco activity reservations is the kind of light-logistics planning that scaffolds the broader non negotiables for traveling approach Yahir later articulates.
  • Pre-Machu Picchu — this is the bus-from-Lima trip, situating the August 2021 Peru itinerary inside the broader six month adventure creed arc.

Source quote

"-plane ride to Cusco
-reserve shit here in Lima or over in Cusco regarding activities
-buy a journal
-climb to the cross
-get sick picture on top of a mural"

Open questions

  • Did Yahir buy that journal? If yes, what entries from the Peru trip live in it that aren't in the digital corpus?
  • "the cross" = Cristo Blanco above Cusco? Any photos in raw/assets/?
  • Who was Yahir traveling with on this leg — Dave (per the July todos mentioning "talk to DMorr about Peru")?
